Your Situation

Where You Are vs Where You Want to Be

Current Situation

  • Partnered with dad in 2020, now running everything solo while dad faces potential medical issues
  • Paying $650/month to Thrive CRM for website + maintenance, but built the site himself because they kept delivering poor work
  • Thrive had them shut down their Wilmington Google Maps listing, causing major ranking and visibility loss
  • Google Ads running but conversion rates are poor relative to spend, eating into profit
  • Workers' comp policy cancelled during audit ($34K bill), causing loss of GAF/CertainTeed/Fortified certifications and directory listings

Desired Situation

  • Steady flow of 2-4 roofing jobs per week (8-16 signed jobs per month)
  • Predictable lead generation so you can plan ahead instead of patching things together week to week
  • Someone to take all tech, marketing, and web responsibilities off your plate so you can focus on running the business
  • Google Maps listing and website both ranking and performing well in Wilmington

Where You're Going Wrong

Authority & Backlink Profile

CRITICAL: 0 Dofollow Backlinks

Every single one of your 59 tracked backlinks is nofollow. Zero are passing authority to your site. This is the #1 thing holding your rankings back.

Domain Rating 67
Referring Domains 83
Total Backlinks 107
Spam Score 0

Howard Roofing has a Domain Rating of 67, which is a solid foundation. However, a critical issue stands out: all 59 of your tracked backlinks are nofollow, meaning none are passing authority to your site. Your top competitors have 2-3x your domain authority. Harbor Roofing sits at DR 147 with 172 referring domains, Province Roofing at DR 208 with 141, and Flores & Foley at DR 144 with 170. Building quality dofollow backlinks is the fastest path to closing this gap.

On-Page Issues Found

  • Low text-to-HTML ratio - pages have too little text relative to code
  • No structured schema markup found (LocalBusiness, FAQ, Service schemas all missing)
  • Workers' comp cancellation removed business from GAF/CertainTeed directories, losing valuable backlinks
  • Zero dofollow backlinks - all 59 tracked backlinks are nofollow, passing no authority
You're ranking #12 for 'roofing wilmington' - right on the edge of page 1. With the right backlink strategy and on-page fixes, pushing into the top 5 is very achievable.

Two roofers. Two different markets. Same system. Same results. Chris, this is what's possible for Howard Roofing in Wilmington.
The Strategy

Leverage Your Previous Jobs With Project Pages

Each roofing job becomes a new page on your website, optimized for Google Maps and local search. Here is a live example from one of our clients:

Live example: Elite Movers project pages with interactive map

Each completed job becomes a new optimized page targeting hyper-specific keywords like 'roof replacement Wrightsville Beach NC' or 'standing seam metal roof Leland NC'. This specificity is what gets you ranked across Google, Google Maps, and AI platforms - because AI pulls from pages that directly answer specific local queries. We build these for you after every project.
Your Roadmap

From Invisible to Dominating Wilmington

1

Month 1 - Foundation

  • Website rebuild (ditch Thrive $650/mo)
  • Schema markup for all services
  • Google Maps re-optimization
  • Begin dofollow backlink building
  • AI entity signal setup
2

Month 2-3 - Growth

  • Aggressive backlink building (15+/mo)
  • Project pages for completed jobs
  • Service area content for Wilmington and beyond
  • AI-optimized FAQ content
  • Review collection system launch
3

Month 4+ - Dominance

  • Competitor monitoring
  • Ongoing backlink building
  • AI ranking optimization
  • Reactivation campaigns for past customers
  • Keyword expansion to new areas
Your $650/month to Thrive gets replaced by a team that actually builds the site, builds the backlinks, and builds your AI presence. You own everything we build - the website, the content, the rankings. You focus on roofing.
